memory_entries.text: SQLite product benchmark schema: g1 is primarily Office Products (items_g1 has prc, rtg_ct plus fdbk_stats_g1; attrs_g1/taxn_g1/fdbk_g1), g2 is Electronics (items_g2 has prc integer and prc_usd real, no rtg_ct; fdbk_g2 reviews), g3 is likely Musical Instruments (items_g3 with prc, rtg_ct; attrs_g3/fdbk_g3).
